assertions.description: The signal_analysis.ethernet_interfaces list contains one entry with phy_reference='U6', phy_value='ESP32-WROOM-32', phy_lib_id='esp32_physlayout:ESP32-WROOM-32'. The ESP32-WROOM-32 is a WiFi/Bluetooth SoC module, not an Ethernet PHY. This is a false positive likely caused by the lib_id containing 'physlayout' triggering a PHY detection pattern. The design has no Ethernet magnetics or RJ45 connectors to support the detection.
